visual_description: A medium shot captures two young people, a boy and a girl, standing side-by-side in a dark, cavernous space. The boy, on the left, has messy brown hair and wears a dark, striped shirt under a dark jacket. The girl, on the right, has her brown hair pulled back and is dressed in a dark jacket with a red collar. They both look down with somber expressions. The background is filled with the dark, gnarled, and menacing forms of what appear to be large, dead trees or roots, creating a gloomy and oppressive atmosphere. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top right corner. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the two characters. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score that creates a sense of dread and anticipation. The music is slow and atmospheric, with deep, resonant tones that build a feeling of unease. The boy turns to the girl, and they embrace in a tight, comforting hug. The girl buries her face in his shoulder as he holds her. The camera stays in the same static medium shot, capturing their emotional moment against the dark, eerie backdrop. The "风行网" watermark remains in the corner
